description: This Python source file provides helper functions for storing inspection photos on local disk storage, including saving uploaded files via FastAPI and managing file paths securely.

methods.name: str _safe_filename(name: str)
methods.description: Sanitizes the filename to prevent directory traversal and other security issues.

methods.name: Tuple[str,str|None] save_inspection_photo(*, inspection_id: int, file: UploadFile)
methods.description: Saves an uploaded inspection photo to local disk, generating a safe filename and directory structure, and returns the file key and content type.

ctags.name: save_inspection_photo
ctags.pattern: /^def save_inspection_photo(*, inspection_id: int, file: UploadFile) -> Tuple[str, str | None]:$/
